name: Alexandra Monroe
title: Senior Product Engineer
sloganHeroSection: I build products people love — from early-stage MVPs to systems at scale.
about: I'm a product engineer with 8 years of experience across fintech, healthtech, and SaaS. I care deeply about the intersection of clean engineering and delightful UX. When I'm not shipping, I'm mentoring junior engineers and contributing to open-source tooling.

experience.description: Led a cross-functional team of 6 to rebuild the core payment infrastructure, cutting p99 latency by 40%. Shipped 3 major product lines.
Built HIPAA-compliant patient intake flows in React + Node.js. Integrated with Epic EHR and reduced onboarding time by 60%.
Developed and maintained a white-label SaaS analytics platform serving 200+ B2B clients.

education.description: Graduated with Distinction. Coursework in distributed systems, algorithms, and human-computer interaction.

projects.title: ClearPath
projects.description: An open-source CLI tool for visualising dependency graphs in monorepos. 2,800+ GitHub stars.

projects.title: Pulse Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time operations dashboard built for a Series B logistics startup. Handles 50k+ events/min.

projects.title: Formix
projects.description: Headless form-state library for React with zero-config validation and TypeScript-first API.

community.title: Open Source Contributor
community.description: Maintainer of two npm packages with 15k+ combined weekly downloads.

community.title: Engineering Mentor
community.description: Volunteer mentor at CodePath, supporting 30+ underrepresented students in tech over 3 cohorts.
